front.title: Cross-Domain Network Agent Architecture for Autonomous Operations

abstract.t: Autonomous network management using agents is maturing in single- domain deployments. However, end-to-end services spanning multiple domains expose a lack of systematic support for cross-domain coordination, roles, and interfaces in current architectures. This document defines a cross-domain network agent architecture that enables coordinated operation across autonomous domains through standardized agent roles, layered coordination mechanisms, and unified interface specifications.
